title: Deslabification (slabs to blocks)
description: Automatically adds recipes to convert all (vanilla + modded) slabs back to blocks
body:
This mod automatically adds recipes to convert slabs back to full blocks, to accompany every single full block to slab recipe. This includes every slab added by mods (probably).

The recipe consists of two slabs next to each other horizontally, as seen in the Gallery tab.
